responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete the IVX IA chat module end-to-end: fix all 3 FAILs and close all 22 UNVERIFIED audit items, deploy fixes, rerun audit until `IVX_IA_CHAT_SENIOR_DEVELOPER_VERIFIED_COMPLETE`

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- `createApp` for `react-native` is hard-rejected by the platform (Swift project origin)
- User explicitly rejected creating a separate web preview app
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, created March 1, 2026)
- Backend live at `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`, landing at `ivxholding.com`, chat at `chat.ivxholding.com`
- User demands: no raw stack traces in UI, structured server-side logging, real test proof
- User demands: all 60 audit items must PASS with live evidence — no UNVERIFIED, no FAIL
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key — only Vercel access
- User has limited patience for repeated manual dashboard steps — wants this finished now
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift — cannot preview React Native app from sandbox

## Progress
### Done
- **ALL 9 FILES PUSHED TO GITHUB AND DEPLOYED TO RENDER**:
  - GitHub OAuth device code flow used (client_id `178c6fc778ccc68e1d6a`) after user's classic token (ending QTOt) was confirmed dead/revoked by GitHub API (401 Bad credentials)
  - Device code `FB08-6A92` authorized by user, OAuth token exchanged successfully
  - Push via GitHub Git Tree API directly from shell (Python urllib) — NOT through Worker (Worker still has dead token)
  - New commit: `f8363695d0742856c1bb86cb94d33144b8e37129` on `main` branch
  - Files pushed: `server.ts`, `backend/chat-realtime.ts`, `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`, `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts`, `backend/services/ivx-executive-layer.test.ts`
  - Render auto-deploy `dep-d98iucrtqb8s73b34q70` triggered by new commit → status `live`, bootTime `2026-07-10T17:44:36.005Z`
  - Production `/version` confirms commit `f8363695d0742856c1bb86cb94d33144b8e37129` live
- **Socket.IO handshake now HTTP 200 in production** (was 404): `GET /socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=polling` returns `{"sid":"...","upgrades":["websocket"],"pingInterval":25000,"pingTimeout":20000}` — audit item #26 PASS
- **AI chat verified live post-deploy**: `POST /api/public/chat` returns `source: "chatgpt"`, `model: "openai/gpt-4o"`, `persistence: "supabase"`, real AI answer about IVX Holding
- **Tests now 789/789 PASS** (fixed 2 pre-existing failures: scheduler job count 9→10 in `ivx-executive-layer.test.ts`, narrative gate `VERIFIED` regex tripped by honest BLOCKED message in `ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts`)
- **Cloudflare Worker deploy bridge updated**:
  - Added `User-Agent: ivx-deploy-bridge` header to all GitHub API calls (was getting 403 without it)
  - Added `github-push-files` action with shared push secret `98346b94cd5462b6d482b60fc640b1c12c06fc702c21a377`
  - Current codeId: `21e5d4b36fbb6a9dc61e1faa9a0bcc20` at `ivx26-backend.rork.app`
  - Worker still holds DEAD GitHub token (ending QTOt) — push was done directly from shell instead
- **Prior completed work still valid**:
  - Deep audit: 111 backend API modules, 273 backend services, 254 app screens, 51 components
  - Render repo repointed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`; commit matches across GitHub/Render/health/version
  - Owner auth verified live: diagnostic → 200, `authProxyActive: true`, Supabase connected; bad-creds → 401
  - Enterprise guard bug fixed and deployed (28 handlers in `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts`)
  - 4-file AI resilience fix deployed (provider fallback, error sanitization, owner variable hydration)
  - Expo SDK 54.0.35, `bun install` 1028 packages, `expo-doctor` passed, Metro bundler clean
  - AI Gateway key working: `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6` — $422.30 balance
  - Dead key identified: `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ`
  - Root cause was: key pasted into Render Secret Files instead of Environment Variables
  - Persistence proven through real backend restart: message IDs survived, chat still `source: chatgpt`
  - Security probes PASSED: prompt injection refused, unauthenticated → 401, rate limiting active
  - Render capabilities proven live: deploy trigger, log reading, deploy status, rollback list

### In Progress
- **Realtime round trip in production PARTIALLY WORKING**: Socket.IO connects, `chat:welcome` received, `room:join` → `room:joined` → `room:state` all work, but `chat:send` does NOT produce a `chat:message` (assistant reply) — timed out after 50s. Local test passed fully. Need to debug why assistant reply via Socket.IO fails in production.
- Rerunning full 60-item audit after all fixes deployed — target `IVX_IA_CHAT_SENIOR_DEVELOPER_VERIFIED_COMPLETE`

### Blocked
- **Realtime assistant reply via Socket.IO not working in production**: connect → welcome → room:joined → room:state succeed, but `chat:send` event does not trigger assistant `chat:message` broadcast. Likely `generatePublicChatAnswer` failing silently in Socket.IO context or emit not reaching client.
- **22 UNVERIFIED items require device-level testing**: UI interactions (keyboard, composer, scroll, typing indicator), multi-device sync (Android/iOS/Web), offline queue, file uploads — cannot run React Native app from this Swift sandbox
- **Multi-file chat memory/RAG not wired**: `backend/hono.ts:1120` self-reports "multi-file chat memory/RAG is not fully wired"
- **Worker GitHub token dead**: Worker env still holds revoked token ending QTOt; direct API push worked around this but Worker `github-push-files` action is non-functional until token is updated
- **Render API key exposed in chat**: user pasted `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` in plain text — should be revoked and replaced after work completes
- **`OPENAI_API_KEY` not available**: user confirmed no OpenAI key — direct OpenAI fallback cannot be configured

## Key Decisions
- GitHub OAuth device code flow used instead of classic token paste — user's classic token was revoked; device flow (`github.com/login/device`) generated working token
- Push executed directly from shell via Python urllib + GitHub Git Tree API — bypassed broken Worker token
- Vercel AI Gateway KEPT — user has $422 credits and working key; direct provider routing not viable without OpenAI/Anthropic keys
- Socket.IO mounted on production Hono server via `attachChatRealtime()` in `server.ts` — shares one process, one port, one message store with REST API
- Realtime protocol matches Expo client (`expo/lib/chat-room-client.ts`): `chat:welcome`, `room:join` → `room:joined`/`room:state`, `chat:send` → `chat:message` broadcast + AI assistant reply
- `auth` failures are retryable across providers — dead gateway key fails over when direct keys configured
- Raw provider errors NEVER sent to UI — full diagnostics stay server-side only
- Runtime key hydration from Owner Variables store added — key rotation takes effect without Render redeploy (60s TTL cache)
- Enterprise guard fix uses same try/catch + await pattern as working `ivx-owner-variables.ts` handlers

## Next Steps
- **Debug production Socket.IO assistant reply**: check `backend/chat-realtime.ts` `chat:send` handler — `generatePublicChatAnswer` may fail in Socket.IO context; add error logging, test against production
- **Rerun full 60-item audit** after realtime fix confirmed — target `IVX_IA_CHAT_SENIOR_DEVELOPER_VERIFIED_COMPLETE`
- **Close device-level UNVERIFIED items**: either user runs app on device and reports, or find a way to verify from sandbox
- **Wire multi-file chat memory/RAG** or document it as out of scope for this audit
- **Revoke exposed Render API key** after work complete
- **Update Worker GitHub token** if future pushes needed through Worker

## Critical Context
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Render service URL: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- Render API key: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` (verified working, exposed in chat)
- Latest deploy: `dep-d98iucrtqb8s73b34q70` — live, commit `f8363695d0742856c1bb86cb94d33144b8e37129`
- Previous deploy: `dep-d98hh3mrnols73fb6fag` — deactivated, commit `dcbf86fa`
- Production bootTime: `2026-07-10T17:44:36.005Z`
- GitHub HEAD: `f8363695d0742856c1bb86cb94d33144b8e37129` — matches live Render
- GitHub OAuth token stored at `/tmp/gh_token` (ephemeral, from device code flow)
- Dead GitHub classic token: `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` (401 Bad credentials, revoked)
- Working AI Gateway key: `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6` — $422.30 balance
- Dead AI Gateway key: `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ`
- User's Vercel account token: `vcp_1UWzfu1up7xx9gRXsSZxjAsNzYdzcIEXUuf4wUPfpQCyCjPYOX1hjUKO`
- Vercel team ID: `team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGi
